brand.name: Meeple & Mug
brand.domain: Board game cafe and tabletop retail brand (neighborhood storefront with online presence)

visual_system.feel: playful illustrated chunky — candy-bright, tactile, like opening a colorful box of dice
motifs: hex-tile background grids (softened to a two-tone wash on mobile)
chunky bordered illustrated cards with hard drop-shadows
meeple silhouettes used as bullet markers and brand mark
dice-face section dividers (d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20)
sticker-style price tags rotated a few degrees with a punched dot
visual_system.typography: Fredoka/Baloo-2 style display fonts paired with Nunito/Quicksand body, with system fallbacks via @font-face local() chains so no network fonts are required.

pages.purpose: Front-door personality + utility — points to events, library, booking, loyalty, and reviews.
implemented_sections: Hero with Roll Sip Repeat tagline and chunky meeple/mug illustrated scene
Dice-face divider row (d4–d20)
Three feature cards: Tonight's Events / New on the Shelf / Book a Table
Tonight & this week — horizontal event chip strip
Featured games of the month — 4-up card row with availability badges
Three signature drinks teaser with sticker price tags
Tavern Pass loyalty band with tier illustration
Latest reviews row
Hours / address / stylized map cluster

pages.purpose: Drinks and snacks menu with allergen filtering and staff picks.
implemented_sections: Chalkboard-style hero with daily special
Allergen / dietary filter chips (vegan, GF, NF, DF, spicy) — toggling hides non-matching items
Four-column diner board: Bites / Sweets / Sips / Spirits & Beer with sticker price tags
Hex-portrait staff pick cards
Private event catering callout linking to booking

pages.purpose: Make the 800-game library feel browsable, not overwhelming.
implemented_sections: Hero with What-are-you-in-the-mood-to-play search bar
Filter rail: player count slider, play-time chips, complexity dots, mood pills, availability toggle
Sort + match count + 12 hand-drawn sample game cards with On Shelf / In Play / Reserved badges
Cafe Staff Favorites callout row
Request-a-game form
pages.interactivity: Vanilla JS filters game cards live based on rail selections and search; sort by A–Z / complexity / play time.

pages.purpose: Surface tournaments, weekly leagues, learn-to-plays, and open socials.
implemented_sections: Hero with Month / List toggle
Event type legend (Tournament / League / Learn-to-Play / Open Social)
Five-week May 2026 calendar grid (color-coded events)
List view fallback with event chips
Featured Heat Grand Prix tournament with inline 8-player bracket viewer (collapsible)
Weekly leagues sidebar (Wingspan / 7 Wonders Duel / Magic Friday)
Submit-a-meetup form for community groups
pages.interactivity: Month/List view toggle; bracket viewer collapses inline.

pages.purpose: Stepper-style private room booking with sticky live-updating summary.
implemented_sections: Hero with three illustrated rooms
Stepper navigation across four steps
Step 1: Three room cards (Dragon's Den / Hex Hall / Quiet Corner) — selection updates summary
Step 2: Date / time / duration / party size
Step 3: Three toggleable add-ons (snack platter, dedicated host, themed setup)
Step 4: Contact and deposit form with terms checkbox
Sticky purple summary sidebar showing room, date, addons, total, deposit
FAQ accordion (cancellation, outside food, kids, teaching, accessibility)
pages.interactivity: JS-driven stepper progression, room selection state, addon toggles, and live total recalculation.

pages.purpose: Loyalty club with tier ladder, comparison table, calculator, and signup.
implemented_sections: Hero with central Tavern Pass medallion illustration
How it works — three-step row
Tier ladder cards (Pawn / Knight / Queen) with chunky icons; Queen card lifted
Perks comparison table with yes/no/threshold cells
Points calculator: visits-per-month × avg spend → annual points, current tier, progress meter to next tier
Signup form on a purple panel
Member testimonial cards
pages.interactivity: Calculator computes points (2 per dollar × visits × 12) and sets tier + progress bar.

pages.purpose: Editorial review hub with rubric scorecards.
implemented_sections: Hero with rubric chips that filter the visible reviews
Lead review of Heat: Pedal to the Metal with full rubric scorecard panel and verdict
Six secondary review cards across rubric categories
Reviewer roster strip with hex-tile portraits
Archive list with year jump
Newsletter signup callout
pages.interactivity: Rubric chips filter review cards by data-review category tags.

tech.stack: Vanilla HTML, CSS, and a single hand-written js/app.js — no build tooling, no npm, no external CDNs.

assets.page_illustrations: All hero scenes, dice dividers, game covers, room illustrations, staff portraits, mascots, and map art are inline SVG.

tech.mobile_behavior: Hex tile background switches to a two-tone wash under 720px; nav collapses behind a hamburger; library filter rail stacks on top of the grid; booking summary becomes inline; calendar and bracket gracefully reflow.
